head.hi: The Secretary of State to All Diplomatic Missions in Latin America

div.p:
Colombian Government addressed note to this Government,Dated January 23, p. 418. as a signatory of Kellogg Pact, asking it to call Peru’s attention to her obligations under that Pact. Secretary of State in a long telegram today to the Minister of Foreign Affairs of Peru set forth the views
of this Government regarding the situation in the light of the correspondence exchanged between Colombia and Peru and urged Peruvian Government to abide by the commitments undertaken by it in Pact of Paris and the declaration of August 3d last and that it accept the solution proposed by the Brazilian Government for a peaceful settlement.
